claims: R006 independently rejects a valid, internally self-consistent and cleanly committed replacement audit snapshot when its payload differs from the immutable Git tree at target_commit.
The decisive rejection mechanism was verify_snapshot_against_git_tree rather than digest mismatch, pack invalidity or dirty-worktree detection.
AUDOBS-R002-CLAUDE-0003 remediation is confirmed for the scoped altered-payload/same-target-commit condition.
non_claims: This does not establish complete audit-system security.
The retest did not exercise substitution of a different declared target commit.
The result is same-family procedural retesting, not cross-provider independent corroboration.
test_scope: valid internally self-consistent committed replacement snapshot with changed payload and unchanged declared target_commit
